Renewal_Trigger: New audit required before 2026-07-31 — engage BEE rating agency immediately
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required for all tenders. Level 3 = 20 B-BBEE points on 90/10 scoring. URGENT: 46 days to expiry.

Renewal_Trigger: Annual renewal — request new PIN from SARS e-Filing when current approaches 12 months
Tender_Usage_Notes: Gate document. Tender disqualified without valid TCC PIN. Current PIN valid to Feb 2027. Previous (20260305) superseded.
Required by public sector tenders. Include with CIPC registration package. No renewal needed.

Source_Filename: Disclosure Certificate 2026.pdf, Consolidated APPSolve Registration Documents.PDF, Cor 39.pdf, BeneficiaryOwnershipDisclosure certificate 20251007.pdf
Renewal_Trigger: Annual CIPC annual return — file by anniversary date
Tender_Usage_Notes: Include full registration package: COR14.3 + Disclosure Cert + Cor39 + Beneficiary Ownership Disclosure. 2026 disclosure filed.

Renewal_Trigger: When report > 12 months old — download fresh from CSD portal (suppliers.treasury.gov.za)
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required for all public sector tenders. Current report dated Aug 2025 — refresh due Aug 2026 (48 days). Use both Detail and Summary reports.

Renewal_Trigger: When letter > 3 months old — request from ABSA Business Banking
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required by most tenders. Dated May 2026. Most tenders require letter < 3 months old — renew by August 2026 (68 days).

Renewal_Trigger: Annual renewal November — engage African Eagle 60 days before expiry (by mid-September 2026)
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required by financial services and enterprise tenders. Confirm coverage amount meets tender minimum. Current cert valid to Nov 2026.

Source_Filename: Confirm filename from broker — obtain from African Eagle
Renewal_Trigger: Annual renewal — confirm exact policy expiry date from policy document; set renewal reminder 60 days prior; engage African Eagle (current broker)
Tender_Usage_Notes: OBTAINED 2026-06-15. Confirm exact expiry date from policy document and update this register. Required by many enterprise and government tenders.

Renewal_Trigger: Annual renewal — submit COIDA return and request letter from Compensation Fund (April each year)
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required by government tenders and many enterprise tenders. Demonstrates COIDA compliance. Current letter valid to April 2027.

Renewal_Trigger: Annual EE report submission (October deadline) — submit via DOL online portal; certificate issued on compliance
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required by public sector tenders. Demonstrates Employment Equity Act compliance. 2025 cert current; 2026 renewal due October 2026.

Renewal_Trigger: Annual renewal — obtain fresh resolution and director signatures before 2027-06-15
Tender_Usage_Notes: RENEWED 2026-06-15. Authorises named directors/employees to sign tenders and contracts. Next renewal due June 2027. Update source filename once confirmed.

Renewal_Trigger: Draft policy and register; engage legal counsel; appoint Information Officer under POPIA
Tender_Usage_Notes: Increasingly required by financial services and enterprise tenders. POPIA in effect since July 2021. Absence creates regulatory risk and tender deduction risk on regulated-sector bids (PSGFS-type tenders).

Renewal_Trigger: Draft Section 51 manual; register with SAHRC; legal obligation for companies with 50+ employees
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required by public sector tenders. Legal obligation under Promotion of Access to Information Act. Non-compliance = reputational and legal risk.

Renewal_Trigger: Obtain current Oracle partner certificate from Oracle Partner Network portal; confirm active tier
Tender_Usage_Notes: Do NOT include in tenders without current certificate. Oracle Gold Partner expired August 2021. Current partner tier unknown — verify with Oracle BU Lead.

Renewal_Trigger: Annual — issued with BEE audit; 2025 signed version available
Tender_Usage_Notes: Required by some tenders for financial capacity assessment. 2025 signed AFS available. Older AFS (2021–2024) also on file.

Renewal_Trigger: Obtain company-level Gold Partner certificate from Acumatica Partner Portal (partner.acumatica.com)
Tender_Usage_Notes: Only individual consultant certifications found. Company-level Gold Partner certificate required for tenders demanding proof of authorised Acumatica VAR status. Gap creates credibility risk on Acumatica-specific bids.
